title: Tet's Lucky Draw
summary: A Capture The Flag (CTF) challenge centered around a Linear Congruential Generator cryptosystem.
description: Originally designed for the CTF-UPB workshop, this challenge presents a TCP service running a guessing game powered by a 32-bit Linear Congruential Generator. It requires attackers to brute-force hidden initial lower bits by analyzing partially revealed LCG states in an interactive oracle environment.
